sections.biography-source-undefined: Yang Di was from Yuzhang. He was Gentleman who Announces Edicts (宣詔郎). He notably refused to associate with Yin Fan, which was regarded as odd by many at the time, but after Yin Fan was executed for espionage, Yang Di won respect.

full_text:
Yang Di 楊迪
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Di (楊迪). Announced edicts. Refused to associate himself with Yin Fan. Yang Di was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.

Short Biography
Announced edicts. Refused to associate himself with Yin Fan.
Details
Traditional Chinese楊迪
Wade-GilesYang Ti
BiographySource Undefined
Yang Di was from Yuzhang. He was Gentleman who Announces Edicts (宣詔郎). He notably refused to associate with Yin Fan, which was regarded as odd by many at the time, but after Yin Fan was executed for espionage, Yang Di won respect.
